name: Snowflake Control Profile
description: Control profile for Snowflake data warehouse, data sharing, stages, unloads, access, masking, and governance workflows.

recommended_tickets.title: Review Snowflake data classification and object tags
recommended_tickets.purpose: Confirm database, schema, table, column, and object tag coverage for governed data.

recommended_tickets.title: Validate Snowflake access roles and service accounts
recommended_tickets.purpose: Confirm least privilege for human roles, service accounts, warehouses, and data shares.

recommended_tickets.title: Review Snowflake masking, row access, and sharing controls
recommended_tickets.purpose: Confirm masking policies, row access policies, and data sharing approvals where sensitive data is involved.

notes: Snowflake should trigger platform-aware controls when it appears in intake, especially for regulated data, external sharing, stages, unloads, or production access.
L6 allows the organization to define its own required tags, roles, approval flows, naming conventions, and monitoring expectations.
